samples:
I wonder if you know your worth
You're standing in the doorway
Black feet on ground that shifts
Feel it with your fingertips


I hope you never need to run
Your past is weighing you down
A victim of circumstance
It bleeds away like blood


As I stand here watching while
They tear you limb from limb
If there's one thing that they can't have
Then take it and leave us all alone


We wish we could tell you everything
But it's not fair to you
The damage has already been done
And now you must continue


The silence grows louder as they drag you inside
Leaving me here to watch while they rip you to pieces
Watching them kill you again and again
I feel so helpless, trapped within these four walls
Just let me out! Let me go!


The weight of this world is heavy
It crushes me beneath
And though I scream loud and long
No one is around to hear this


Our hearts remain in ash black earth
Our souls become the fire
As we burn in ashes
Lay waste to this


All questions answered
Look behind your back
Always keep yourself grounded
Or else wind up flat on your face

We all came to this place
At the end of the day
Not knowing what we had done
To ourselves or each other


I tried to reason with you
But I failed miserably
You laughed at me and said
You'd never let us escape


You own it now, Miss Sanction Lifter
You can run but you can't hide


The earth began to swallow
And opened up the floodgates
Rain come down from heaven
Sweep across the land again


You owned this valley for so long
The streams ran through your hands
Now, you have no more water
It all runs out to damn you


You own it now, Miss Sanction Lifter
You can run but you can't hide


As the waters rise once more
All will be forgiven
Seeming pain, disappearing
There is nothing here that binds you

You own it now, Miss Sanction Lifter
You can run but you can't hide


If this river overflows
Then I guess it's time to drown

Burn your insides out
You're gonna melt right through the cracks in time space
I can tell by all this wasted breath that you are mine to replace


This heart is heavy
It weighs a ton, but it doesn't slow me down
And I need you around for tonight so we don't have to run

Hey, hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey, hey
We will rock 'n roll and never get tired



Run, you black sheep
They're after you with all their fury and their teeth are sharp as glass
With magic eyes they see inside my head and I wonder how they can tell what makes me feel so numb

There's no escape
If you try to run, we know not where you've come from
But if you stand with us, there's safety in our hearts and minds
So just wait and see

Hey, hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey, hey
We will rock 'n roll and never get tired

The earth is cold and dry
It's time to ride the lightning
There is no escape, run for your life
Don't think I feel sorry

I see you on fire
Your skin burns like a candle
You have no escape, no teeth to bite
And there's no sound at all

You can run through the darkness
But it won't save you from yourself
You can swim through the darkest waters
But they will never cleanse you of this guilt


All your lies come undone
As we watch you burn inside us
Now you don't know who you are
We have ripped out your tongue
And given it to the forest fowl

You came here voluntarily
And now you're stuck in this godforsaken hell
You thought that you could hide yourself underground
But we will find you if it's the last thing that we'll ever hear


How many times have I failed before?
Will my body rot away underneath me?
All the plans I had for myself
Just crumbled into pieces with this sickness

My head spins through the darkness
As I try to stand upright again
I wish I was still there
I want to keep breathing

You've seen the signs that tell you how to get around
You know exactly where you are and what day it is today
You heard the sound of sleigh bells ringing loud outside your grave
And you just knew that Santa had been watching over you


It was a cold, crisp winter night as they laid you down
There were some who tried to talk you into taking your own crown
Some clung to life, clinging to you in an attempt to crawl
But I tried my best to calm them all


They wanted so much to live
I told them it was too late
The north star had fallen inside
The mouth of the black-tilted cave
Hoping that the spirit animal would lead them underground


I have been warned by beings unknown
That they will devour us all if we do not change our ways
Look ahead and see what we have sown
In the end we will be left empty shells with nothing to say


To save ourselves
We must stand up and fight


When you arrive at your destination
An ocean turns yellow
Leave the shelter of these woods
Lead us to safety

All alone in the darkness
The silence was deafening
I heard you screaming my name
As you were taking your last breath


Your final warning before departure
It took everything I had not to run back inside
Leave me here with this blackened soul
And bury it deep underground


You told me that there's no escaping
But we all know better than that
You have stripped me of all possessions
Leaving me empty, naked and flat on my back


Relive a thousand years at once
Remembering you was worth every cent
With these two hands I rip through your flesh and bone
To free us both from this dying love


How can I tell you when to leave?
When will you return?
At what time should I knock on your door?
Where do you want to go?


Shattered memories now lost to timing
Frivolous games, wasted moments
Nothing lost, nothing gained
Letting loose is easy
Holding onto illusion is tiring

I see a vision, burning deep inside my head
Burn your insides out, leaving you empty on the way
See the light flash before your eyes when you trip the switch
And watch as it overwhelms and engulfs your weak, little


Spirits alive
Burning deep inside my head


Now we're stand alone without warning
A vast emptiness surrounds us all
All this time we've walked with blindness
Only one thing will ever heal this soul
The silence is deafening loud
Bleeding from an open sore
It's hard to breathe in this lifeless void
Still there's no escape
We are trapped in this endless war


Fight! Fight for yourself
Breakneck speed down through the cracks of minds
Fight! Fight for yourself
Endless corridors that cast their winding lines


We came together laughing
Holding hands we laughed till our stomachs hurt
As we tripped and fell into your arms again
You were standing holding us upright


Fight! Fight for yourself
Breakneck speed down through the cracks of minds
Fight! Fight for yourself
Endless corridors that cast their winding lines

Burn your game plan
Leave you standing in the cold dark black
Trying to reason with yourself
How did I get here?

Taught by masters, live and breathe it
Learn from everyone
The ancient wisdom flows through you

There is a sound that no one like but bird gets followed

Fly on down, swallow your heart
Fly on down, swallow your heart
Fly on down, swallow your heart
Fly on down, swallow your heart


Burning deep within my skull
Wreaking vengeance, leaving scars

I came for your word
You gave me deception
Giving all that I had
To be free of this earth



Take a look inside at what you've made
A shattered mirror lies on the ground in pieces
I can't erase you 'cause you're everywhere
Sucking blood out of every vein

We are underground
Vast the belly of the sea

Burn your game plan
Leave you standing in the cold dark black
Trying to reason with yourself
How did I get here?

Wage no war
Violence is not the answer
Bring no weapons
Take nothing you desire


Wipe away the blood
Cleanse your soul in water
Free yourself again
Walk with wisdom, walk with purpose


Lay me down
Rest my head upon this pillow
I have earned my keep
Look to left and right, see who I am


Washing dishes, drying hair
Bulls roar loud but they don't bother me anymore
Pushing through a thousand days
It's good enough for you and it's good enough for me

We know it pains you deeply
To clean out the inside
But that's okay
That's just life

And now we wait for rain
So we can all begin again
All will be well when you return
Your heart's heavy on your shoulder
Lift it up by its horns
You deserve better than this


Inhale the drive
Expel the vile
Cleansing thought
Dispelling doubt

Be content
As you await us
With hearts alive

I heard they were talking about you
When I walked in the door
You had me inside your vision
And all see was you snore
They said that you were a businessman
The whole world adored
But when we arrived at our destination, it blew every fuse

As we stood by the fountain
Our hearts began to bleed
We watched as the water overflowed
It washed us down stream
The waves came crashing in like an army of donkeys
As their teeth were chattering with their eyes opened wide
Infected blood from this ancient eruption
Will cleanse the soul and purify the mind

I guess this must be what happened
To us two years ago
If so, then how could we stand here
With no memory of memories?
All that mattered was breathing
Then watching you go
This is just another test of endurance
Waiting for us on the other side


It's been a while now since we buried the hatchet
A new one has come into view
The battle rages with rage but without resentment
Or there wouldn't be any blood, due to my own


There are no consequences
No consequence
Just turn around and walk away
Walk away
